title: HR ADMIN
description:
Key responsibilities

  • Manage end-to-end HR administration, Example employment contracts, onboarding, probation reviews, confirmations, resignations, clearances and offboarding.
  • Oversee payroll coordination, collect timesheets, process OT/allowances/deductions, liaise with payroll vendor, ensure CPF and statutory compliance.
  • Administer employee benefits (medical, insurance, claims) and manage renewals.
  • Handle MOM and CPF compliance, work pass applications/renewals (EP/SP/Work Permit), and statutory reporting.
  • Lead recruitment and onboarding for production, technical and corporate roles; prepare job adverts, shortlist, interview coordination and offer management.
  • Act as first point of contact for employee queries, grievances and disciplinary matters; conduct investigations and recommend resolutions.
  • Support performance management, appraisals, promotions and training programs; maintain training records.
  • Partner with EHS/operations on workplace safety, incident reporting and return-to-work processes.
  • Maintain HRIS and employee records, produce management reports and HR KPIs.
  • Prepare and maintain HR policies, SOPs and process improvements; manage relationships with external vendors (agencies, insurers, trainers).

Qualifications & skills

  • Diploma or degree in Human Resources, Business Administration or related field.
  • Minimum 3-4 years’ HR experience, preferably in manufacturing/constructions sector.
  • Solid knowledge of Singapore employment laws (Employment Act, MOM guidelines, CPF).
  • Hands-on experience with payroll coordination, HRIS, recruitment and employee relations.
  • Strong communication, stakeholder-management, problem-solving and confidentiality skills.
  • Highly organized, detail-oriented and able to manage multiple priorities.
  • Experience supervising junior staff and managing vendors.

postedCompany.description:
Diamond Glass Enterprise Pte Ltd (DGE) is a leader in the design, manufacture, supply, installation and maintenance of architectural glass in the contruction industry. With our main office and manufacturing facility in Singapore, we provide our Clients with a wide range of glass products, services & solutions. 

Beginning as a contractor for glazing and rope access works since 2006, and now with it's design, manufacturing and supply division, Diamond Glass Enterprise continuos to be a strong and dependable partner highly responsive to customer requirements. Our versatility makes us a one-stop solution for all your construction and industrial glass needs.
postedCompany.name: DIAMOND GLASS ENTERPRISE PTE. LTD.
